IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO EDUCATE TEAMS OF PHYSICIAN LEADERS, BOARD MEMBERS AND HEALTH CARE MANAGERS SO THAT THEY CAN BETTER SERVE THEIR PATIENTS AND ALL PEOPLE IN THEIR LOCAL COMMUNITIES AND CAN EXERCISE LEADERSHIP IN THE FIELD.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE WRITTEN POLICY IS FOLLOWED ALLOWING THE ORGANIZATION TO PROVIDE FIRST CLASS TRAVEL FOR ALL FACULTY MEMBERS (INCLUDING THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS) AND A GUEST TO ATTEND CONFERENCES. IF THEY ARE ENGAGED TO SPEAK, THEY HAVE TO SIGN A DISCLOSURE. SPOUSES AND GUESTS HAVE TO VOLUNTEER IN ORDER TO HAVE THE TRAVEL EXPENSES COVERED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VII, SECTION A, LINE 5
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PLEASE SEE FORM 990, SCHEDULE L, PART IV FOR PAYMENT DETAILS

BusTrInvolveInterestedPrsnGrp.RelationshipDescriptionTxt: EMPLOYEE/OWNER OF COMPANY IS A DIRECTOR OF ESTES PARK INSTITUTE

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 IS PREPARED BY RICHEY, MAY & CO., LLP. THE INITIAL REVIEW IS PERFORMED BY THE VICE PRESIDENT/ACCOUNTANT AND THE FINAL REVIEW IS PERFORMED BY THE CEO. ONCE THE FINAL REVIEW BY CEO IS COMPLETE, THE VICE PRESIDENT SIGNS AND MAILS THE FORM 990.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MONITORS THE SPEAKERS TO MAKE SURE THEY ABIDE BY THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY THEY SIGN BEFOREHAND.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VII CONTACT ADDRESSES FOR OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, ETC
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: JOHN TISCORNIA - 7683 SE 27TH STREET #313, MERCER ISLAND, WA 98040. LEANNE CARLSON - KAISER INSTITUTE, PO BOX 339, BRIGHTON, CO 80601. DELLA LIN - 893 KAOHE PLACE, HONOLULU, HI 96825. GARY KAPLAN - VIRGINIA MASON TEAM MEDICINE, PO BOX 900, SEATTLE, WA 98011. STUART ALTMAN - 11 BAKERS HILL ROAD, WESTON, MA 02493. STEVEN TRINGALE - TRINGALE HEALTH STRATEGIES, LLC, 529 MAIN STREET STE 604, CHARLESTOWN, MA 02129.
